claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a full shot-conditioned erasure decoder, calibrated leakage model, threshold estimate, new code, hardware result, or production QEC design.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Under a Stim generated rotated-surface-code memory circuit, some heralded-erasure target-volume improvements survive positive false-positive flag rates after explicit overhead penalties.

title: B2 heralded-erasure false-positive overhead stress
toolchain: Stim HERALDED_ERASE / DEPOLARIZE1 plus PyMatching detector-error-model decoder; candidate erasure rate is leakage_rate + false_positive_rate
